title: trifolium lucanicum
intro: Trifolium lucanicum, also known as Lucanic clover, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Trifolium lucanicum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
